title: nepeta dschuparensis
intro: Nepeta dschuparensis, also known as Dshupar Catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Nepeta dschuparensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds and flu. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tinctures or salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
